config.script:
class RapParamCustom Private m_strXMLPart Private m_strVBPart Private m_strFopenPart Private m_strParamName Private m_strBindExpr Private m_strBindExprRight Private m_nMode Private m_strFirstValue Private m_strWhereCustom Private m_pAfc Private m_bAllowNone public m_pFilterPage'a tak sobie pomocniczo :-) private m_nParamNr private m_strExtraXMLPart private m_strExtraInitPart public ctrls_id public ctrls_obj Public Sub initialize() m_nMode = 0 m_strXMLPart = "" m_strVBPart = "" m_strBindExpr = "" m_strBindExprRight = "" m_strFopenPart = "" m_strExtraXMLPart = "" m_bAllowNone = False m_strFirstValue = "" m_strWhereCustom = "(1=1)" End Sub Public Function allow_none() m_bAllowNone = True End Function Public Property Let ParamName(ByVal vData ) m_strParamName = vData End Property Public Property Get ParamName() ParamName = m_strParamName End Property Public Property Let first_value(ByVal vData ) trans_.var(9830) = vData End Property Public Property Get first_value() if trans_.isvar(9830) then first_value = trans_.var(9830) else first_value = "" end if End Property Public Property Let last_value(ByVal vData ) trans_.var(9831) = vData End Property Public Property Get last_value() if trans_.isvar(9831) then first_value = trans_.var(9831) else first_value = "" end if End Property Public Property Let ExtraXML(ByVal strData ) m_strExtraXMLPart = strData End Property Public Property Let ExtraINIT(ByVal strData ) m_strExtraInitPart = strData End Property Public Property Let mode(ByVal nMode) trans_.var(9829) = nMode End Property Public Property Get mode() if trans_.isvar(9829) then mode = trans_.var(9829) else trans_.message 0,0,"Brak zdefiniowanej zmiennej 9829" mode = 0 end if End Property Public Function Bind(ByVal strTableName , ByVal strFieldName ) m_strBindExpr = strTableName + "." + strFieldName Set Bind = Me End Function Public Function BindExpr(ByVal strBindExpr ) m_strBindExpr = strBindExpr Set BindExpr = Me End Function Public Function BindExprRight(ByVal strBindExprRight ) m_strBindExprRight = strBindExprRight Set BindExprRight = Me End Function Public Function get_bindexpr() get_bindexpr = m_strBindExpr End Function Public Function get_xml_part(ByVal nParamNr , ByRef pRPDB ) Dim firstId: firstId = nParamNr * 10 m_strXMLPart = vbCrLf + vbCrLf + _ " " + vbCrLf m_strXMLPart = m_strXMLPart + vbCrLf + m_strExtraXMLPart + vbCrLf m_strXMLPart = m_strXMLPart + _ "
" + vbCrLf + _ "
" + vbCrLf + _ " " + vbCrLf + _ "
" + vbCrLf + _ " " + vbCrLf m_strXMLPart = m_strXMLPart + vbCrLf + _ " " + vbCrLf get_xml_part = m_strXMLPart End Function Public Function get_vb_part(ByVal nParamNr , ByRef pRPDB ) Dim firstId: firstId = nParamNr * 10 m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ "function check" + CStr(nParamNr) + vbCrLf + _ " check" + CStr(nParamNr) + " = true" + vbCrLf + _ "end function " m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function init" + CStr(firstId) + vbCrLf m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + m_strExtraInitPart + vbCrLf m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " end function" + vbCrLf if firstId <> 10 then m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function desc" + CStr(firstId) + "(newValue)" + vbCrLf + _ " " + vbCrLf + _ " end function" + vbCrLf end if if firstId = 10 then m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function desc" + CStr(firstId) + "(newValue) " + vbCrLf + _ " if bError then exit function " + vbCrLf + _ " dim strDesc " + vbCrLf + _ " trans_.var(9829) = newValue " + vbCrLf + _ " dim strDokladnie:strDokladnie= page_.ctrl(151).value " + vbCrLf + _ " dim strPoczatek:strPoczatek= page_.ctrl(161).value " + vbCrLf + _ " dim strZawiera:strZawiera= page_.ctrl(171).value " + vbCrLf + _ " dim strOd:strOd= page_.ctrl(182).value " + vbCrLf + _ " dim strDo:strDo= page_.ctrl(183).value " + vbCrLf + _ " dim strTylkoKonta:strTylkoKonta= page_.ctrl(181).value " + vbCrLf + _ " dim strKontaRozpoczynajaceSie:strKontaRozpoczynajaceSie= page_.ctrl(191).value " + vbCrLf + _ " dim strKontaZawierajace:strKontaZawierajace= page_.ctrl(192).value " + vbCrLf + _ " if clng(newValue)=1 then " + vbCrLf + _ " strDesc=""Pole 'Symbol' dowolne "" " + vbCrLf + _ " trans_.var(9830) = "" (1=1) "" " + vbCrLf + _ " elseif clng(newValue)=2 then " + vbCrLf + _ " strDesc=""Pole 'Symbol' równe '""+strDokladnie+ ""'"" " + vbCrLf + _ " trans_.var(9830) = strDokladnie " + vbCrLf + _ " g_strSymbol = strDokladnie " + vbCrLf + _ " elseif clng(newValue)=3 then " + vbCrLf + _ " strDesc=""Pole 'Symbol' rozpoczyna się od '""+strPoczatek+ ""'"" " + vbCrLf + _ " g_strSymbol = strPoczatek " + vbCrLf + _ " trans_.var(9830) = strPoczatek " + vbCrLf + _ " elseif clng(newValue)=4 then " + vbCrLf + _ " strDesc=""Pole 'Symbol' zawiera '""+strZawiera+ ""'"" " + vbCrLf + _ " g_strSymbol = strZawiera " + vbCrLf + _ " trans_.var(9830) = strZawiera " + vbCrLf + _ " elseif clng(newValue)=5 then " + vbCrLf + _ " strDesc=""Pole 'Symbol' zawiera się między '""+strOd+ ""' i '""+strDo+ ""'"" " + vbCrLf + _ " g_strSymbol = strOd + strDo " + vbCrLf + _ " trans_.var(9830) = strOd " + vbCrLf + _ " trans_.var(9831) = strDo " + vbCrLf + _ " elseif clng(newValue)=6 then " + vbCrLf + _ " strDesc=""Pole 'Symbol' tylko konta:'""+strTylkoKonta+ ""'"" " + vbCrLf + _ " g_strSymbol = strTylkoKonta " + vbCrLf + _ " trans_.var(9830) = strTylkoKonta " + vbCrLf + _ " elseif clng(newValue)=7 then " + vbCrLf + _ " strDesc=""Pole 'Symbol' - Konta rozpoczynające się od:'""+strKontaRozpoczynajaceSie+ ""'"" " + vbCrLf + _ " g_strSymbol = strKontaRozpoczynajaceSie " + vbCrLf + _ " trans_.var(9830) = strKontaRozpoczynajaceSie " + vbCrLf + _ " elseif clng(newValue)=8 then " + vbCrLf + _ " strDesc=""Pole 'Symbol' - Konta zawierające:'""+strKontaZawierajace+ ""'"" " + vbCrLf + _ " g_strSymbol = strKontaZawierajace " + vbCrLf + _ " trans_.var(9830) = strKontaZawierajace " + vbCrLf + _ " end if " + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(199).text=strDesc " + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(199).forecolor=rgb(0,0,0) " + vbCrLf + _ " end function " + vbCrLf m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function c13_ondataentered(oCtrl, byval newValue) " + vbCrLf + _ " bError = false " + vbCrLf + _ " c13_ondataentered=true " + vbCrLf + _ " desc10(page_.ctrl(13).value) " + vbCrLf + _ " dim bEnableDokladnie:bEnableDokladnie=false " + vbCrLf + _ " dim bEnablePoczatek:bEnablePoczatek=false " + vbCrLf + _ " dim bEnableZawiera:bEnableZawiera=false " + vbCrLf + _ " dim bEnableOd:bEnableOd=false " + vbCrLf + _ " dim bEnableDo:bEnableDo=false " + vbCrLf + _ " dim bEnableTylkoKonta:bEnableTylkoKonta=false " + vbCrLf + _ " dim bEnableKontaRozpoczynajaceSie:bEnableKontaRozpoczynajaceSie=false " + vbCrLf + _ " dim bEnableKontaZawierajace:bEnableKontaZawierajace=false " + vbCrLf + _ " if clng(newValue)=2 then " + vbCrLf + _ " bEnableDokladnie=true " + vbCrLf + _ " elseif clng(newValue)=3 then " + vbCrLf + _ " bEnablePoczatek=true " + vbCrLf + _ " elseif clng(newValue)=4 then " + vbCrLf + _ " bEnableZawiera=true " + vbCrLf + _ " elseif clng(newValue)=5 then " + vbCrLf + _ " bEnableOd=true " + vbCrLf + _ " bEnableDo=true " + vbCrLf + _ " elseif clng(newValue)=6 then " + vbCrLf + _ " bEnableTylkoKonta=true " + vbCrLf + _ " elseif clng(newValue)=7 then " + vbCrLf + _ " bEnableKontaRozpoczynajaceSie=true " + vbCrLf + _ " elseif clng(newValue)=8 then " + vbCrLf + _ " bEnableKontaZawierajace=true " + vbCrLf + _ " else " + vbCrLf + _ " end if " + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(151).disable=not bEnableDokladnie " + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(161).disable=not bEnablePoczatek " + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(171).disable=not bEnableZawiera " + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(182).disable=not bEnableOd " + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(183).disable=not bEnableDo " + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(181).disable=not bEnableTylkoKonta " + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(191).disable=not bEnableKontaRozpoczynajaceSie " + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(192).disable=not bEnableKontaZawierajace " + vbCrLf + _ " end function" + vbCrLf m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function c13_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) " + vbCrLf + _ " desc10(oCtrl.value)" + vbCrLf + _ " c13_ongetdata = true " + vbCrLf + _ " end function" + vbCrLf m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function c151_ondataentered(oCtrl, newValue) " + vbCrLf + _ " bError = false " + vbCrLf + _ " end function " + vbCrLf + _ " function c151_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) " + vbCrLf + _ " desc10(page_.ctrl(13).value) " + vbCrLf + _ " c151_ongetdata=true " + vbCrLf + _ " end function " + vbCrLf m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function c161_ondataentered(oCtrl, newValue) " + vbCrLf + _ " bError = false " + vbCrLf + _ " end function " + vbCrLf + _ " function c161_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) " + vbCrLf + _ " desc10(page_.ctrl(13).value) " + vbCrLf + _ " c161_ongetdata=true " + vbCrLf + _ " end function " + vbCrLf m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function c171_ondataentered(oCtrl, newValue) " + vbCrLf + _ " bError = false " + vbCrLf + _ " end function " + vbCrLf + _ " function c171_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) " + vbCrLf + _ " desc10(page_.ctrl(13).value) " + vbCrLf + _ " c171_ongetdata=true " + vbCrLf + _ " end function " + vbCrLf m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function c181_ondataentered(oCtrl, newValue) " + vbCrLf + _ " bError = false " + vbCrLf + _ " end function " + vbCrLf + _ " function c181_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) " + vbCrLf + _ " desc10(page_.ctrl(13).value) " + vbCrLf + _ " c181_ongetdata=true " + vbCrLf + _ " end function " + vbCrLf m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function c182_ondataentered(oCtrl, newValue) " + vbCrLf + _ " bError = false " + vbCrLf + _ " end function " + vbCrLf + _ " function c182_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) " + vbCrLf + _ " desc10(page_.ctrl(13).value) " + vbCrLf + _ " c182_ongetdata=true " + vbCrLf + _ " end function " + vbCrLf m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function c183_ondataentered(oCtrl, newValue) " + vbCrLf + _ " bError = false " + vbCrLf + _ " end function " + vbCrLf + _ " function c183_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) " + vbCrLf + _ " desc10(page_.ctrl(13).value) " + vbCrLf + _ " c183_ongetdata=true " + vbCrLf + _ " end function " + vbCrLf m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function c191_ondataentered(oCtrl, newValue) " + vbCrLf + _ " bError = false " + vbCrLf + _ " end function " + vbCrLf + _ " function c191_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) " + vbCrLf + _ " desc10(page_.ctrl(13).value) " + vbCrLf + _ " c191_ongetdata=true " + vbCrLf + _ " end function " + vbCrLf m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function c192_ondataentered(oCtrl, newValue) " + vbCrLf + _ " bError = false " + vbCrLf + _ " end function " + vbCrLf + _ " function c192_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) " + vbCrLf + _ " desc10(page_.ctrl(13).value) " + vbCrLf + _ " c192_ongetdata=true " + vbCrLf + _ " end function " + vbCrLf m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " 'przechowuje dane wpisane dla pol przy wyborze symbolu" + vbCrLf + _ "dim g_strSymbol " + vbCrLf + _ " 'co zostało wybrane : dokladnie, pocztek, zawiera, tylko konta... " + vbCrLf + _ " dim g_iWybor" + vbCrLf end if get_vb_part = m_strVBPart End Function Public Function get_desc():get_desc = "" dim mode,strWhat if trans_.isvar(9829) then if trans_.isvar(9830) then mode = trans_.var(9829) strWhat = "'"+trans_.var(9830) + "'" if mode = 2 then get_desc = "Pole 'Symbol' równe " elseif mode = 3 then get_desc = "Pole 'Symbol' rozpoczyna się od " elseif mode = 4 then get_desc = "Pole 'Symbol' zawiera " elseif mode = 5 then get_desc = "Pole 'Symbol' zawiera się miedzy " if trans_.isvar(9831) then strWhat=strWhat + ",'" + trans_.var(9831)+"'" end if elseif mode = 6 then get_desc = "Pole 'Symbol' tylko nastepujace konta: " elseif mode = 7 then get_desc = "Pole 'Symbol' tylko konta rozpoczynające sie od: " elseif mode = 8 then get_desc = "Pole 'Symbol' tylko konta zawierające: " end if get_desc = get_desc + strWhat end if end if End Function ' instrukcje inicjujące stany kontrolek - do fopen Public Function get_vb_init_ctrls_part(ByVal nParamNr , ByRef pRPDB ): get_vb_init_ctrls_part = "" Dim firstId: firstId = nParamNr * 10 m_strFopenPart = "init" + CStr(firstId) + "()" + vbCrLf get_vb_init_ctrls_part = m_strFopenPart End Function Private function przepiszBezPustych(byval pstrKontzpus,byref pstrKonta) dim iter for iter = 0 to pstrKontzpus.UpperIndex() if pstrKontzpus.value(iter) <>"" then pstrKonta.add pstrKontzpus.value(iter) end if next end function Public Function get_where_part(ByRef pTransaction) : get_where_part = "" dim iMode,strWartosc,strWartosc2 if trans_.isvar(9829) then iMode = trans_.var(9829) else trans_.message 0,0,"Brak zmiennej przekazującej nr. zaznaczonej pozycji" exit function end if if trans_.isvar(9830) then strWartosc = trans_.var(9830) if trans_.isvar(9831) then strWartosc2 = trans_.var(9831) end if else trans_.message 0,0,"Brak zmiennej przekazującej wpisaną wartość" exit function end if dim pstrKonta,pstrKontaZPus dim iter,strConnect Select Case iMode Case 1 get_where_part = "(" + m_strBindExpr + " is not null)" case 2 get_where_part = "(" + m_strBindExpr + " COLLATE latin1_general_cs_as like '"+strWartosc+"')" case 3 get_where_part = "(" + m_strBindExpr + " COLLATE latin1_general_cs_as like '"+strWartosc+"%')" case 4 get_where_part = "(" + m_strBindExpr + " COLLATE latin1_general_cs_as like '%"+strWartosc+"%')" case 5 get_where_part = "(" + m_strBindExpr + " COLLATE latin1_general_cs_as between '"+strWartosc+"' and '"+strWartosc2+"')" case 6 'tylko konta set pstrKonta = trans_.afc.new_navoarray() set pstrKontaZPus = trans_.afc.new_navoarray() pstrKontazPus.Separate strWartosc,"," przepiszBezPustych pstrKontaZPus,pstrKonta strConnect = " (" for iter = 0 to pstrKonta.UpperIndex() strConnect = strConnect + "(" + m_strBindExpr + " COLLATE latin1_general_cs_as like '" + pstrKonta.value(iter) + "')" if iter
